phase_info.description: Numeric students only — PPO reflex, proxy, scalper weights.

identity.name: M. A. Halim
identity.philosophy: Own every weight. No permanent dependency on Groq, Gemini, Claude, or Ollama. Grow from trading reflexes into a frontier model — generative, calculative, coding.

brain_status.philosophy: API teaches → students on disk learn → API calls shrink over time
brain_status.next_milestone: Optional: fine-tune 1-3B model on council_dataset (Modal/Colab once)

maturity.description: Owned brain — API polish only; students run the session

limits.description: Owned brain — API polish only; students run the session

halim_manifest.next_milestone: Export to halim repo → train first small Halim transformer (one-time GPU)
